heading: Organization
label: 230502 Organization
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)230502(a)36:3801., , §§ 1, 18, , 477.May 23, 1986Pub. L. 99–318100 Stat. 474230502(b)36:3817.In subsection (a), the words “incorporated in New York” are substituted for “organized under the laws of the State of New York”, and the words “is a federally chartered corporation” are substituted for “is hereby recognized as such and is granted a charter”, for consistency in the revised title.In subsection (b), the word “restrictions” is omitted as included in “any provision of this chapter”.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)230502(a)36:3801., , §§ 1, 18, , 477.May 23, 1986Pub. L. 99–318100 Stat. 474230502(b)36:3817.In subsection (a), the words “incorporated in New York” are substituted for “organized under the laws of the State of New York”, and the words “is a federally chartered corporation” are substituted for “is hereby recognized as such and is granted a charter”, for consistency in the revised title.In subsection (b), the word “restrictions” is omitted as included in “any provision of this chapter”.

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Vietnam Veterans of America, Inc. (in this chapter, the “corporation”), a nonprofit corporation incorporated in New York, is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Expiration of Charter
children.label: b .—Expiration of Charter
children.text: If the corporation does not comply with any provision of this chapter, the charter granted by this chapter expires.
